w:r.w:t: ZELVIA RANI FEBRIANTI DWI SAPUTRI

linkedin.com/in/zelvia-rani
github.com/Zelviarani16

I am a fourth-semester D4 Informatics Engineering student at Universitas Airlangga, passionate about web development and always eager to explore new technologies. I thrive in collaborative environments, bringing enthusiasm and a never-give-up attitude to every project I join. As someone who genuinely enjoys working in teams, I believe that the best solutions emerge from shared ideas and open communication. TEDx Universitas Airlangga represents a meaningful opportunity for me to grow — both technically and personally — while contributing real value to an event that inspires and challenges people to think differently. I am committed to learning without limits and delivering my best alongside a motivated team.
EDUCATION (FORMAL AND INFORMAL)
D4 Informatics Engineering — Universitas Airlangga, Surabaya
Current GPA: 3.66/4.0
2024 – Present
SMA Wachid Hasyim 5 Surabaya
Natural Sciences — GPA: 92.4

TECHNICAL EXPERTISE

HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript — responsive layouts, interactive UI

RELEVANT PROJECTS
E-Ticketing App | Mobile & Backend Project
Developed a cross-platform mobile application for event ticketing using Flutter and Dart.
Integrated Supabase for real-time database management and backend services.
Built RESTful APIs using Laravel and rigorously tested endpoints with Postman.
Bloomerie Bouquets | Front-End Project
Designed and built a flower bouquet e-commerce website using Next.js and Tailwind CSS v4.
Implemented smooth animations inspired by TEDx event design language using Framer Motion.
Integrated a WordPress CMS backend to manage blog and product content seamlessly.
Elmar Cafe & Eatery | Front-End Project
Built a responsive landing page with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript for a culinary business.
Applied Flexbox and CSS Grid for consistent cross-device layout rendering.
Implemented sticky navigation, smooth scrolling, and interactive UI components.
Rumah Sakit Hewan Pendidikan (RSHP) | Full-Stack Project
Developed a hospital management system using PHP, Laravel Blade, and MySQL.
Implemented full CRUD operations and a secure authentication system for hospital staff.
Inventory Management System | Full-Stack Project
Built a web-based inventory system with PHP and Laravel, featuring stock, sales, and procurement tracking.
Engineered advanced MySQL logic using Triggers, Functions, and Views for data automation.
